there is a demonstrated need for the project; and
the project complies with program requirements and appropriate standards of housing quality and habitability, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Construction
children.label: c Construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed as prohibiting the Secretary from renewing contracts under this part in accordance with criteria set forth in a provision of this part other than this section.
